attachments.fallback: Easy Method to Split Large VCF Files? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: The <https://www.macsonik.com/vcf-splitter/|MacSonik VCF Split&Merge Tool> for Mac is a powerful and efficient solution for managing vCard or VCF files on macOS. It enables users to combine multiple VCF files into one consolidated file or divide a large VCF file into several smaller files without compromising any contact details. The software is compatible with all key vCard formats, including versions 2.1, 3.0, and 4.0, ensuring seaml…
